jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - ICAT - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
ICAT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ICAT:
ICAT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICAT!
